scores.correctness_notes: Covers nearly all events from the gold standard including lifecycle, relation, storage, pebble, action, secret, leader, collect-status, and update-status hooks. Missing collect_metrics (deprecated) and pre/post series upgrade is mentioned. Missing pebble_check_failed and pebble_check_recovered events.
scores.hallucination_notes: Missing pebble_check_failed and pebble_check_recovered events which exist in the gold standard. Does not include Python class names (InstallEvent, etc.) that the gold standard uses. Uses hyphenated hook names rather than Python ops event names (underscored), which is a different naming convention but not strictly wrong for Juju hook names. No clearly fabricated items.
